title: GOV.UK CKAN personas, stories and interaction journeys
description: CKAN-specific traceability and browser journeys for discovery metadata, dataset reality, source inspection and durable Explorer interactions.

personas.name: Catalogue researcher
personas.need: Find datasets by subject or publisher and understand what this harvested catalogue does and does not claim.

personas.name: Department data lead
personas.need: Find all catalogue records attributed to a department, including standard names and abbreviations.

personas.name: Data engineer
personas.need: Inspect formats, resources, hosts, APIs and download routes before attempting reuse.

personas.name: Service assessor
personas.need: Verify deterministic search, facets, sorting, history, disclosures and accessible graph controls.

personas.name: Provenance auditor
personas.need: Distinguish stale catalogue metadata from publisher-operated source data and preserve both as evidence.

personas.name: Demonstrator
personas.need: Show a repeatable large-corpus journey with clear counts, stable links and no raw JSON replacing Explorer.

stories.user_story: Search for a public organisation by canonical name or abbreviation and see publisher-aware results rather than common-word noise.
Find a dataset family by place or subject and use facets to see related records without treating the catalogue as the whole web.
Inspect formats, API indicators, capability documents and access routes to judge whether a record is operationally reusable.
Inspect licence, access, quality, catalogue dates and provenance while opening source JSON inside Explorer and preserving the raw endpoint as a new-tab option.
Inspect a selected record's graph relationships and resize the row drawer without losing the graph target.
Apply a facet and sort, share the public URL state, and restore the same reduction with browser Back and Forward.

journeys.title: Filter and sort Land Registry results with Back and Forward restoration
Highlight a selected relationship and drag the relationship drawer
Load a full CKAN record, use folded sections and inspect source data without replacing Explorer

start.query: Land Registry INSPIRE Download Service Metadata

actions.value: Land Registry INSPIRE Download Service Metadata
